case_title: GNLV, CORP., A NEVADA CORPORATION, DBA GOLDEN vs. KUNG, KWING CHAU AKA KWING "GODWIN" et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GNLV, CORP., A NEVADA CORPORATION, DBA GOLDEN NUGGET HOTEL & CASINO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KUNG, KWING CHAU AKA KWING "GODWIN" KUNG, CHAU $17,534.88 PRINCIPAL, $107.52 INTEREST, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,722.40 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
